full_text:
Han Heng (Zipei)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Heng, styledZipei. Refused to join leader Chu in serving Cao Cao due to kindness received from the Yuans. Han Heng was affiliated with Yuan Shao and Yuan Shang.
